channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: OpenAI takes on rivals with new Responses API, Agents SDK
item.description: OpenAI’s new Responses API and an upgraded Agents SDK will help enterprises more easily build agents with advanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities, the company said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: US State Department Plans to Use AI to Monitor Social Media and Tamp Down on Dissent
item.description: The US State Department is planning to use AI to monitor social media and revoke foreign student visas, sparking concerns about privacy and digital rights.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: SAP: Latest news and insights
item.description: SAP is an enterprise software vendor based in Walldorf, Germany. Its cloud and on-premises enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, including S/4HANA, helps organizations manage their business operations and customer relations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Military AI is here. Some experts are worried
item.description: For the first two-and-a-half years of the generative AI revolution, the AI arms race has been waged between competing companies seeking to make bank from the promise and potential of the technology. But things are maturing in the AI world—and with it, there’s another frontline for AI: the military.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Johnson says Congress will investigate attacks against Tesla owners, vehicles
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) said Wednesday that Congress will investigate attacks against Tesla vehicles and their owners as Elon Musk’s flagship electric vehicle company faces mounting backlash over its CEO’s controversial role in the Trump administration’s cost-cutting initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Agentic AI – Ongoing coverage of its impact on the enterprise
item.description: Over the next few years, agentic AI is expected to bring not only rapid technological breakthroughs, but a societal transformation, redefining how we live, work and interact with the world. And this shift is happening quickly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Infostealer Malware: A Growing Threat to Online Safety
item.description: A newly published report reveals a sharp rise in infostealer malware infections, with nearly 26 million devices affected and over 2 million unique bank card details leaked.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: French publishers and authors sue Meta over copyright works used in AI training
item.description: French publishers and authors said Wednesday they're taking Meta to court, accusing the social media company of using their works without permission to train its artificial intelligence model.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Many workers aren't sure how much their companies are set up to help them be productive
item.description: Workers aren’t getting the right type of support at work due to poor employee experiences, and companies are starting to realize.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: ServiceNow’s Yokohama platform release focuses on agentic AI
item.description: ServiceNow today launched its newest Now Platform release, Yokohama, which doubles down on the company’s commitment to agentic AI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again episode 3 contains another Marvel reference to Spider-Man, but it's got nothing to do with Tom Holland's Peter Parker
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again's latest entry might have just confirmed the existence of another Spider-Man in the MCU.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Virgin Media O2 reveals £700m network transformation plan to boost reliability across the board
item.description: Virgin Media O2 is boosting its networks across the UK with existing fibre networks and satellite connections.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: France rejects controversial encryption backdoor provision
item.description: Encryption is saved in France, but this protection may be at risk in other European countries. Here's what at stake.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: MasOrange se alza con el grueso del contrato de ‘telecos’ del Estado
item.description: MasOrange está de enhorabuena; y es que la operadora que capitanea Meinrad Spenger en su rol de CEO se ha adjudicado el grueso del contrato de servicios de telecomunicaciones de la Administración General del Estado, bautizado como CORA III (Comisión para la Reforma de las Administraciones Públicas,
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Evolution of IT: A Conversation with Bob McCowan
item.description: Bob McCowan, CIO at Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, shares his insights on the intersection of technology and science, highlighting the importance of data management, AI trends, and cloud adoption in driving innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, Fox 5
